assets.alt: State Streaming 前后对比：默认行为是 tool 结束后一次性 STATE_SNAPSHOT（等 3-5 秒）；加 StateStreamingMiddleware 后 tool argument 直接 token 级灌入 shared state，文档编辑器 UI 和 chat 文本并行流式更新
assets.prompt_brief: Before/After side-by-side: BEFORE grayed-out panel shows LangGraph timeline → STATE_SNAPSHOT full doc → UI spinner with ~3-5s delay, annotation 'tool 跑完才一次性发完整文档'; AFTER highlighted panel shows TOOL_CALL_ARGS dotted stream feeding STATE_DELTA JSON Patch token-by-token into a live editor card (blinking caret) in parallel with TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT to chat, annotation 'tool argument 流式灌入 state → UI 实时重渲染'; bottom dark code box shows StateStreamingMiddleware(StateItem(...)) snippet

assets.alt: Headless 派 vs Bundle 派决策图：积木派（assistant-ui + Vercel AI SDK，最轻但 HITL/GenUI 自己写）vs 整套派（CopilotKit + AG-UI，全家桶但锁协议）；下方 4 个 decision diamonds 指引选栈
assets.prompt_brief: Two camp cards at top — Headless bricks icon with assistant-ui + Vercel AI SDK (pros/cons) vs Bundle toolbox icon with CopilotKit + AG-UI (pros/cons); below, 4 decision diamond flows: (1) agent 只是 chat?→Headless; (2) 要住在业务界面 + shared state/HITL/GenUI?→Bundle; (3) 跨 framework 切换/协议中立?→Bundle/CopilotKit; (4) 重度 LangGraph?→CoAgents most mature; clay-orange footer '看产品对 agent 的嵌入深度'
